title: Iron Chests Tweaks Compat
description: Adds the ability to sort Iron Chests with mods like Mouse Tweaks and Inventory Essentials
body:
Adds the ability to sort Iron Chests with mods like Mouse Tweaks and Inventory Essentials. The Iron Chests mod does not natively support middle-mouse click sorting. This mod simply bypasses the limitations and sorts items at the click of a button.


<details>
<summary>Original Mods</summary>

IRON CHESTS - - - https://modrinth.com/mod/cyberanner-ironchest

INVENTORY ESSENTIALS - - - https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-essentials

</details>
